text_original: when I texted the character and I have to wait for the next day if I leave the character and come back to the character the words I text are deleted and I have to retext
text_zh: 当我给角色发消息后，如果我离开再回来，就必须等到第二天，而且我发过的话会被删除，导致我不得不重新发送。
reply_original:
Hi there! I am truly sorry for the unpleasant experience. It sounds like a sync issue where your messages aren't being saved properly. 

To help us fix this, please email your UID and a screen recording of the issue to support@fantachat.ai. Our tech team will investigate immediately. We want to ensure your stories are safe with us!
reply_zh:
你好！对于这次不愉快的使用体验，我深表歉意。这听起来像是同步问题，导致您的消息未能被正确保存。

为了帮助我们解决此问题，请将您的 UID 和该问题的录屏发送至 support@fantachat.ai。我们的技术团队将立即展开调查。我们希望确保您的故事在我们的平台上是安全的！
